description: Hatharasing Gamage Siripala Vs. Dr. K. D. Pradeep Wijesinghe and 5 Other before Hon.K. M. S. DISSANAYAKE, J
parties: Hatharasing Gamage Siripala Vs. Dr. K. D. Pradeep Wijesinghe and 5 Other
keywords: Writ application-preliminary objection as to the maintainability of the application-objection not substantiated and or supported-its legal effect-preliminary objection as to the maintainability of the application raised for the first time in the written submissions without leave of Court being first had and obtained and without notice to the other parties to the action-its legal effect.
legistation: Articles 140 of the Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka.
